name: Crystallized Violets
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: Both gum arabic and rose water are available from drugstores or cake decorating supply stores.
Dissolve the gum arabic in the rose water until the solution forms a paste. Using a small brush, paint each violet bloom with the solution. Then dip the flowers in superfine sugar. Leave to dry on a wire rack in a warm place. Store the petals in an airtight container and use them as edible garnishes for desserts.
